column4: PURPOSE (should be a verb phrase to sound right while installing)
contains AMD CPU microcode updates for hardware bug and security fixes.
provides NVIDIA's CUDA toolkit for GPU-accelerated computing.
provides NVIDIA's CUDA Deep Neural Network library for accelerating AI and machine learning workloads.
provides NVIDIA's open-source kernel modules and userspace driver components for supported GPUs.
provides a graphical utility to configure NVIDIA driver settings.
enables PyTorch to use NVIDIA CUDA GPUs for accelerated computation.
enables the optimized TensorFlow build to use NVIDIA CUDA GPUs for accelerated computation.
